Home / Services / Electrical Panel Upgrades

Electrical Panel Upgrades

Modernizing outdated panels to handle today's power demands safely.

Many Dallas-area homes still operate with 60-amp panels that can't support modern appliances and electronics. We specialize in upgrading these systems without disrupting your daily life.

For Preston Hollow's historic estates, we carefully preserve original features while installing 200-amp panels with whole-home surge protection. In Frisco's newer developments, we integrate smart panels that let homeowners monitor usage via app.

Texas heat means air conditioners draw heavy loads - we size panels appropriately so your system won't trip breakers during August heatwaves. All upgrades include city permitting and final inspection coordination.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Assess current panel and household power needs
  2. 02 Step 2: Obtain necessary Dallas city permits
  3. 03 Step 3: Install new panel with minimal downtime
  4. 04 Step 4: Test all circuits and complete city inspection

Benefits

  • Eliminate frustrating breaker trips
  • Support home additions and EV chargers
  • Reduce fire risks in older panels
  • Increase property value

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a panel upgrade take in Plano?

Most single-family home upgrades take 6-8 hours. We schedule them weekdays to minimize disruption.

Will my power be off during the upgrade?

We coordinate temporary power solutions so you'll only be without electricity for about 2 hours during the actual panel swap.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with electrical panel upgrades? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-ele-r93
